records.m_Talk_ENG: I was afflicted by the <color=#ffd34c>Red Moon phenomenon</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike you, though, I'm only half-afflicted.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike you, though, I'm only half-afflicted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I started my research to overcome the madness eating away at me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I started my research to overcome the madness eating away at me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I started my research to overcome the madness eating away at me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At first, I used my own household servants.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At first, I used my own household servants.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At first, I used my own household servants.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They were the most convenient test subjects.

records.m_Talk_FRA: They were the most convenient test subjects.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then the corpse in the graveyard was...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then the corpse in the graveyard was...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then the corpse in the graveyard was...

records.m_Talk_ENG: My last remaining servant.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My last remaining servant.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My last remaining servant.

records.m_Talk_ENG: One tried to escape but was devoured by a C.O. A shame, really.
records.m_Talk_DEU: One tried to escape but was devoured by a C.O. A shame, really.
records.m_Talk_FRA: One tried to escape but was devoured by a C.O. A shame, really.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The experiments didn't go well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The experiments didn't go well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The experiments didn't go well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: While I succeeded in inducing mutations, the madness was uncontrollable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: While I succeeded in inducing mutations, the madness was uncontrollable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: While I succeeded in inducing mutations, the madness was uncontrollable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike what I forced onto you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike what I forced onto you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike what I forced onto you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After countless failures, I came to a realization.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After countless failures, I came to a realization.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After countless failures, I came to a realization.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That my half-factor would never be enough to complete my research.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That my half-factor would never be enough to complete my research.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That my half-factor would never be enough to complete my research.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You experimented on your own people?!

records.m_Talk_FRA: You experimented on your own people?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A necessary sacrifice for progress.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A necessary sacrifice for progress.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A necessary sacrifice for progress.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Had I remained stuck, I would have definitely given up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Had I remained stuck, I would have definitely given up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Had I remained stuck, I would have definitely given up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In fact, I even used you to cover my tracks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In fact, I even used you to cover my tracks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In fact, I even used you to cover my tracks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?

So calling me for an exorcism was just
8g

records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm a scientist. "Hauntings" are just unproven theories.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What people call ghosts are nothing more than the Corruption at work.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What people call ghosts are nothing more than the Corruption at work.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What people call ghosts are nothing more than the Corruption at work.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that's why you were willing to pay me whatever I asked?

records.m_Talk_FRA: So that's why you were willing to pay me whatever I asked?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought I'd just found some senile old fool to scam!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought I'd just found some senile old fool to scam!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought I'd just found some senile old fool to scam!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then how did you know I was afflicted?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then how did you know I was afflicted?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then how did you know I was afflicted?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: At first, it was the scent of the Corruption rays from the Red Moon phenomenon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At first, it was the scent of the Corruption rays from the Red Moon phenomenon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At first, it was the scent of the Corruption rays from the Red Moon phenomenon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Back then, I only had my suspicions...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Back then, I only had my suspicions...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Back then, I only had my suspicions...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So... what exactly happened while I was out of it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So... what exactly happened while I was out of it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So... what exactly happened while I was out of it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>You suddenly charged straight at the C.O.s.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>You suddenly charged straight at the C.O.s.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>You suddenly charged straight at the C.O.s.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kept mumbling about how your blood was boiling.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kept mumbling about how your blood was boiling.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kept mumbling about how your blood was boiling.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The moment you were consumed by madness and tore through those C.O.s, I knew for sure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The moment you were consumed by madness and tore through those C.O.s, I knew for sure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The moment you were consumed by madness and tore through those C.O.s, I knew for sure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I analyzed your blood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I analyzed your blood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I analyzed your blood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It has an incredibly high manifestation rate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It has an incredibly high manifestation rate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It has an incredibly high manifestation rate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Practically a <color=#ffd34c>new species</color>.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Practically a <color=#ffd34c>new species</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-then with my factor...

records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-then with my factor...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was able to partially recreate the Red Moon phenomenon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was able to partially recreate the Red Moon phenomenon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was able to partially recreate the Red Moon phenomenon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This city is merely a byproduct of that process.

records.m_Talk_FRA: You're sick...!

records.m_Talk_FRA: You should take pride in it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your manifestation rate is high enough to trigger this phenomenon.
